overview.title: Kubernetes AI Diagnostic Platform
overview.subtitle: CRD-driven, AI-powered cluster analysis with auto-fix capabilities
overview.card.runs.title: Diagnostic Runs
overview.card.runs.desc: Create a DiagnosticRun CR — an AI Agent automatically scans your cluster for health, security, cost, and reliability issues
overview.card.skills.title: Skill Management
overview.card.skills.desc: 5 built-in analysis skills + custom DiagnosticSkill CRs for flexible diagnostic extensions
overview.card.fixes.title: Smart Fixes
overview.card.fixes.desc: Generate patches or new resources from findings with Before/After diff preview and human-in-the-loop approval

about.title: Architecture & Features
about.arch.title: System Architecture
about.arch.desc: The Controller watches CRD changes and creates isolated Agent Pods per diagnostic run. Agents read cluster data via MCP tools, call the LLM for analysis, and produce structured Findings. Users can trigger Fix generation from any Finding — the LLM produces a patch that goes through approval before the Reconciler applies it.
about.crd.title: CRD Overview
about.crd.run: DiagnosticRun — Declares a diagnostic task with target namespaces, skills, timeout, and output language
about.crd.skill: DiagnosticSkill — Defines analysis logic for a dimension (Prompt + tool whitelist), built-in or custom
about.crd.model: ModelConfig — LLM provider configuration (API Key Secret reference, model name)
about.crd.fix: DiagnosticFix — A proposed fix (patch or new resource) with approval workflow and optional auto-rollback
about.flow.title: Diagnostic & Fix Flow
about.flow.step1.desc: Declare a diagnostic task via Dashboard or kubectl, specifying scan scope and parameters
about.flow.step2.desc: Controller creates an isolated Agent Job — LLM makes multi-turn MCP tool calls to analyze the cluster
about.flow.step3.desc: Structured issues grouped by dimension (health / security / cost / reliability)
about.flow.step4.desc: Click 'Generate Fix' on any finding — LLM reads the target resource and produces a patch
about.flow.step5.desc: Review Before/After diff, approve to let the Reconciler apply. Auto-rollback on failure.
about.tools.title: MCP Tool Set
about.tools.desc: Agent Pod embeds k8s-mcp-server (Go) with 9 read-only tools:
about.tools.list: kubectl_get · kubectl_describe · kubectl_logs · kubectl_explain · events_list · top_pods · top_nodes · list_api_resources · prometheus_query
